source: The Noble Qur'an — Sahih International translation

verses.arabic: إِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
verses.translation: Indeed, with hardship comes ease.

verses.arabic: فَٱذْكُرُونِىٓ أَذْكُرْكُمْ وَٱشْكُرُوا۟ لِى وَلَا تَكْفُرُونِ
verses.translation: So remember Me; I will remember you. And be grateful to Me and do not deny Me.

verses.arabic: لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا
verses.translation: Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear.

verses.arabic: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ
verses.translation: And whoever relies upon Allah — then He is sufficient for him.

verses.arabic: وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مَخْرَجًا
verses.translation: And whoever fears Allah — He will make for him a way out.

verses.arabic: أَلَا بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ ٱلْقُلُوبُ
verses.translation: Unquestionably, by the remembrance of Allah hearts are assured.

verses.arabic: لَا تَقْنَطُوا۟ مِن رَّحْمَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعًا
verses.translation: Do not despair of the mercy of Allah. Indeed, Allah forgives all sins.

verses.arabic: ٱدْعُونِىٓ أَسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ
verses.translation: Call upon Me; I will respond to you.

verses.arabic: لَئِن شَكَرْتُمْ لَأَزِيدَنَّكُمْ
verses.translation: If you are grateful, I will surely increase you in favor.

verses.arabic: كُلُّ نَفْسٍ ذَآئِقَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ
verses.translation: Every soul will taste death.

verses.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
verses.translation: Say, He is Allah, One.

verses.arabic: ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabic: إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِينُ
verses.translation: It is You we worship and You we ask for help.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱسْتَعِينُوا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَٱلصَّلَوٰةِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ
verses.translation: O you who have believed, seek help through patience and prayer. Indeed, Allah is with the patient.

verses.arabic: فَبِمَا رَحْمَةٍۢ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ لِنتَ لَهُمْ
verses.translation: So by mercy from Allah, you were lenient with them.

verses.arabic: وَٱعْتَصِمُوا۟ بِحَبْلِ ٱللَّهِ جَمِيعًا وَلَا تَفَرَّقُوا۟
verses.translation: And hold firmly to the rope of Allah all together and do not become divided.

verses.arabic: وَمَنْ أَحْيَاهَا فَكَأَنَّمَآ أَحْيَا ٱلنَّاسَ جَمِيعًا
verses.translation: Whoever saves one life — it is as if he had saved mankind entirely.

verses.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّ صَلَاتِى وَنُسُكِى وَمَحْيَاىَ وَمَمَاتِى لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: Say, Indeed, my prayer, my rites of sacrifice, my living and my dying are for Allah, Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabic: وَكُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ وَلَا تُسْرِفُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
verses.translation: And eat and drink, but be not excessive. Indeed, He does not like those who commit excess.

verses.arabic: قُل لَّن يُصِيبَنَآ إِلَّا مَا كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ لَنَا
verses.translation: Say, Never will we be struck except by what Allah has decreed for us.

verses.arabic: وَٱصْبِرْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُضِيعُ أَجْرَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.translation: And be patient, for indeed, Allah does not allow to be lost the reward of those who do good.

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ لَا يَا۟يْـَٔسُ مِن رَّوْحِ ٱللَّهِ إِلَّا ٱلْقَوْمُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
verses.translation: Indeed, no one despairs of relief from Allah except the disbelieving people.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُغَيِّرُ مَا بِقَوْمٍ حَتَّىٰ يُغَيِّرُوا۟ مَا بِأَنفُسِهِمْ
verses.translation: Indeed, Allah will not change the condition of a people until they change what is in themselves.

verses.arabic: مَنْ عَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا مِّن ذَكَرٍ أَوْ أُنثَىٰ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَنُحْيِيَنَّهُۥ حَيَوٰةً طَيِّبَةً
verses.translation: Whoever does righteousness, whether male or female, while being a believer — We will surely cause him to live a good life.

verses.arabic: وَقَضَىٰ رَبُّكَ أَلَّا تَعْبُدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِيَّاهُ وَبِٱلْوَٰلِدَيْنِ إِحْسَـٰنًا
verses.translation: Your Lord has decreed that you worship none but Him, and to parents, good treatment.

verses.arabic: ٱلْمَالُ وَٱلْبَنُونَ زِينَةُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.translation: Wealth and children are but adornment of the worldly life.

verses.arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًا
verses.translation: And say, My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

verses.arabic: لَّآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنتَ سُبْحَـٰنَكَ إِنِّى كُنتُ مِنَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.translation: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.

verses.arabic: وَعِبَادُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلَّذِينَ يَمْشُونَ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ هَوْنًا
verses.translation: The servants of the Most Merciful are those who walk upon the earth in humility.

verses.arabic: وَإِذَا مَرِضْتُ فَهُوَ يَشْفِينِ
verses.translation: And when I am ill, it is He who cures me.

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ جَـٰهَدُوا۟ فِينَا لَنَهْدِيَنَّهُمْ سُبُلَنَا
verses.translation: Those who strive for Us — We will surely guide them to Our ways.

verses.arabic: وَمِنْ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦٓ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوَٰجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا
verses.translation: And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates that you may find tranquility in them.

verses.arabic: وَوَصَّيْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ بِوَٰلِدَيْهِ
verses.translation: And We have enjoined upon man care for his parents.

verses.arabic: لَّقَدْ كَانَ لَكُمْ فِى رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ
verses.translation: There has certainly been for you in the Messenger of Allah an excellent pattern.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ذِكْرًا كَثِيرًا
verses.translation: O you who have believed, remember Allah with much remembrance.

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَآ أَمْرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيْـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
verses.translation: His command is only when He intends a thing that He says to it, Be, and it is.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ قَالُوا۟ رَبُّنَا ٱللَّهُ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَقَـٰمُوا۟ تَتَنَزَّلُ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ
verses.translation: Indeed, those who have said, Our Lord is Allah, and then remained on a right course — the angels will descend upon them.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَتْقَىٰكُمْ
verses.translation: Indeed, the most noble of you in the sight of Allah is the most righteous of you.

verses.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
verses.translation: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: وَهُوَ مَعَكُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ
verses.translation: And He is with you wherever you are.

verses.arabic: وَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ يَهْدِ قَلْبَهُۥ
verses.translation: And whoever believes in Allah — He will guide his heart.

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَٱلْحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًا
verses.translation: He who created death and life to test you which of you is best in deed.

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
verses.translation: We feed you only for the countenance of Allah. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.

verses.arabic: وَلَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرْضَىٰ
verses.translation: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.

verses.arabic: فَإِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
verses.translation: For indeed, with hardship comes ease.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لَفِى خُسْرٍ
verses.translation: Indeed, mankind is in loss.

verses.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
verses.translation: Then exalt Him with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.

verses.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْفَلَقِ
verses.translation: Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak.

verses.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.translation: Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind.
